description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named publish that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment and only if the commit reference starts with refs/tags. It checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Python 3.10, upgrades pip, installs dependencies from requirements.txt, installs the build package, builds a binary wheel and source tarball, and publishes the distribution to both Test PyPI and PyPI using provided API tokens.
